mapper.sql: SELECT A.SEQ, A.RESUME_SEQ, A.PERSON_ID, A.EMPID, A.LOCAL_NAME, A.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(A.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPTNAME, A.POST_GRADE_NO, A.POST_GRADE_NAME, A.MAIN_BUSINESS, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(A.MAIN_BUSINESS, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) MAIN_BUSINESS_NAME, A.OBJECT_TYPE, A.OBJECT_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.DATE_STARTED, 'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED, A.ACTIVITY, GET_CODE_NAME(A.ACTIVITY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ACTIVITY_NAME, A.ORDERNO FROM EVS_OBJECT A WHERE A.SEQ IN (SELECT AFF.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ FROM EVS_AFFIRM AFF WHERE AFF.RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AFF.AFFIRMOR_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AFF.AFFIRM_LEVEL = #{affirmLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVS_OBJECT A WHERE A.SEQ IN (SELECT AFF.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ FROM EVS_AFFIRM AFF WHERE AFF.RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AFF.AFFIRMOR_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AFF.AFFIRM_LEVEL = #{affirmLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT OBJECT.SEQ, RESUME.EVS_YEAR, OBJECT.RESUME_SEQ, OBJECT.LOCAL_NAME, OBJECT.POST_GRADE_NAME, OBJECT.MAIN_BUSINESS, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(OBJECT.MAIN_BUSINESS, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) MAIN_BUSINESS_NAME, OBJECT.OBJECT_TYPE, OBJECT.OBJECT_TYPE_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(OBJECT.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPTNAME, TO_CHAR(OBJECT.DATE_STARTED, 'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_STARTED, OBJECT.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RESUME.EVS_START_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') EVS_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RESUME.EVS_END_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') EVS_END_DATE, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'LOCAL_NAME') LOCAL_NAME2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'SEQ') SEQ0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'SEQ') SEQ1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'SEQ') SEQ2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'EVS_POINT') EVS_POINT2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 0, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE0, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'EVS_GRADE') EVS_GRADE2, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_COMMENT') AFFIRM_COMMENT1, PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(OBJECT.SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_COMMENT') AFFIRM_COMMENT2 FROM EVS_RESUME_INFO RESUME, EVS_OBJECT OBJECT WHERE RESUME.SEQ = OBJECT.RESUME_SEQ AND OBJECT.SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_AFFIRM SET AFFIRM_COMMENT = #{affirmComment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE AFFIRM_LEVEL = #{affirmLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
